# Full bidirectional link workflow through the real CLI.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

# Scan fallback covers wiki title, alias, heading, markdown relative path,
# ignored external links, ambiguous targets, broken links, and orphan listing.
exec pinax note links Alpha --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"note.links"'
stdout '"engine":"scan"'
stdout '"links":"6"'
stdout '"resolved":"4"'
stdout '"broken":"1"'
stdout '"ambiguous":"1"'
stdout '"target_alias":"Alias Gamma"'
stdout '"target_heading":"Deep"'
stdout '"kind":"markdown"'
stdout '"target_path":"notes/delta.md"'
stdout '"target":"Missing Target"'
stdout '"status":"ambiguous"'
! stdout 'example.com'

exec pinax note backlinks Beta --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"note.backlinks"'
stdout '"backlinks":"1"'
stdout 'notes/alpha.md'

exec pinax note orphans --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"note.orphans"'
stdout '"mode":"full"'
stdout 'notes/lone.md'

# Fresh index path still returns equivalent graph facts and supports link-target search.
exec pinax index rebuild --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"index.rebuild"'
stdout '"status":"success"'

exec pinax note links Alpha --vault vault --json
stdout '"links":"6"'
stdout '"resolved":"4"'
stdout '"broken":"1"'

exec pinax search Alpha --link-target notes/delta.md --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"note.search"'
stdout '"filter.link_target":"notes/delta.md"'
stdout '"returned":"1"'
stdout 'notes/alpha.md'

! exec pinax search Alpha --link-target Shared --vault vault --json
stdout '"code":"link_target_ambiguous"'
stdout 'notes/shared-a.md'
stdout 'notes/shared-b.md'

-- vault/notes/alpha.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_alpha
title: Alpha
kind: reference
---

# Alpha

See [[Beta]], [[Gamma|Alias Gamma]], [[Epsilon#Deep]], [Delta](delta.md), [Web](https://example.com), [[Shared]], and [[Missing Target]].
-- vault/notes/beta.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_beta
title: Beta
kind: reference
---

# Beta

Linked by Alpha.
-- vault/notes/gamma.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_gamma
title: Gamma
kind: reference
---

# Gamma

Alias target.
-- vault/notes/epsilon.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_epsilon
title: Epsilon
kind: reference
---

# Epsilon

## Deep

Heading target.
-- vault/notes/delta.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_delta
title: Delta
kind: reference
---

# Delta

Markdown relative target.
-- vault/notes/shared-a.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_shared_a
title: Shared
kind: reference
---

# Shared

First duplicate.
-- vault/notes/shared-b.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_shared_b
title: Shared
kind: reference
---

# Shared

Second duplicate.
-- vault/notes/lone.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_lone
title: Lone
kind: reference
---

# Lone

No graph edges.
